body.error: Failed to download or store notice

variables.name: foundrySystemPrompt
variables.value: You are a structured data extraction assistant. Extract information from HTML documents and return only valid JSON. Be precise and thorough.

variables.name: extractionPrompt
variables.value:
Extract these fields from the HTML notice as JSON:
- title: The main notice title/subject
- noticeType: Type of notice (Maintenance, Capacity Constraint, Force Majeure, etc.)
- status: Initiate, Supersede, or Cancel
- postedDate: When notice was posted (ISO 8601)
- effectiveDate: When notice takes effect (ISO 8601)
- endDate: When notice expires (ISO 8601, null if none)
- description: Main content/body of the notice (cleaned text, not HTML)
- affectedLocations: List of affected locations/meters if mentioned
- responseRequired: true if response is required, false otherwise

Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown or explanation.

Archives raw HTML files older than 30 days by moving to archive container. Runs on schedule.
